page.title: Questions For The Author
page.description: No decision-critical question is currently blocking the project. The default submission target is a systems/visualization cross-domain paper, and the first artifact evaluation will use AgentSight's own multi-day history
page.bodyHtml: No decision-critical question is currently blocking the project. The default submission target is a systems/visualization cross-domain paper, and the first artifact evaluation will use AgentSight's own multi-day history before adding external repositories.

index.title: AgentSight: System-wide AI agent profiling and monitoring with eBPF

previous.title: OpenTelemetry GenAI Export
previous.description: AgentSight can export the LLM calls it captures as OpenTelemetry GenAI semantic-convention (genai.) spans, sent to any OpenTelemetry Collector over OTLP/HTTP.
